title: Landing Zone Vending Request
description: Schema for ITSM-sourced landing zone provisioning requests.

workloadName.description: Short workload name. Used in naming and tagging. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only.

workloadCategory.description: Determines the deployment path. 'ApprovedWorkload' runs Step 2 (LZA modules). 'BYO' runs Step 3 (custom networking).

environment.description: Deployment environment. Controls subscription offer type and management group placement.

baseIpAddress.description: Base IP address for the VNet. Combined with networkSize to derive the CIDR. Required for BYO workloads only.

networkSize.description: Determines the VNet prefix length. Small=/27, Medium=/26, Large=/25. Required for BYO workloads only.

workloadType.description: Connectivity model. Private=Corp MG + vWAN peering + DNS. Public=Online MG. Sandbox=isolated. Required for BYO workloads only.

approvedWorkload.description: Configuration for approved workload patterns. Required when workloadCategory is 'ApprovedWorkload'.

pattern.description: The approved workload pattern to deploy.

workloadType.description: Connectivity model for approved workloads. Private triggers vWAN connection in Step 4.

spokeVNetAddressSpace.description: Full CIDR for the spoke VNet. Caller is responsible for correct sizing. Minimum /21 for ACA LZA.

exposeWith.description: How the container app environment is exposed externally.

certKeyName.description: Name of the certificate key in Key Vault for the Application Gateway TLS termination.

vmAdminPassword.description: Admin password for the jump box VM.

vmSize.description: SKU for the jump box VM.

enableApplicationInsights.description: Deploy Application Insights for the container app environment.

enableDaprInstrumentation.description: Enable Dapr instrumentation via Application Insights.

roleAssignments.description: RBAC role assignments to apply at subscription scope post-deployment.

principalId.description: Object ID of the principal (user, group, or service principal).

roleDefinitionId.description: Full resource ID of the role definition.

resourceProviders.description: Resource providers to register on the new subscription. Key = provider namespace, value = array of features to enable.

tags.description: Mandatory request tags. Four additional tags are appended by the pipeline at deploy time.
